title: Eva Wants to Sleep
writer: Tadeusz Chmielewski, Andrzej Czekalski, Jeremi Przybora
actors: Barbara Lass, Stanislaw Mikulski, Stefan Bartik
plot: A young female student arrives in a new city, and finds herself in a confusing situation: there is no place for her for sleeping. An incredible odyssey through the endless maze of night streets is ahead.
